shellContext: testv01 — Load hero URL, open Transcript compare dock (both disclosure rows), paste ASR / plain transcript / captions into the three columns. Document / Split views show compiled markdown from the outline. Wire onAiIterate for real generative fills; offline stub expands placeholders only.
drawerQuickNotes:
testv01 checklist:
- Hero ingest: YouTube URL is already on the tab.
- Open dock → open Whisper/transcript/captions when pasting text.
- Capture (menu): import stills or local-video freeze frames for EXIF + luma scan.
- Merge sources → prompt before seed if you want the URL in the topic line.

tabs.researchPrompt: testv01: clip study + doc layout (images, headings, lists)

sections.title: testv01 — YouTube clip & generative doc layout
sections.body:
Primary clip: [open on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y7-h3vn2ah8) (`y7-h3vn2ah8`).

Use **Document** or **Split** in the workbench toolbar for reading-room layout. Below: sample markdown (image + list) for layout smoke-test.

children.title: Still + figure caption
children.body:
![layout smoke — picsum seed testv01](https://picsum.photos/seed/testv01overview/720/405)

*Figure: random still via picsum seed `testv01overview` (replace with your own frame captures from Menu → Capture when needed).*

children.title: Transcript pipeline (manual paste)
children.body:
| Column | Paste source |
| --- | --- |
| Whisper | Host / device ASR export |
| transcript | Clean spoken text |
| captions | `.srt` / `.vtt` / timed export |

Enable **Sync scroll** to keep columns aligned while skimming.

children.title: Generative outline (host)
children.body: With `onAiIterate` wired: use **Expand (AI)** / **Refine** on cards, or seed from the hero topic line. Stub host leaves deterministic placeholder text only.
